subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His are the grandeur and the power, the might and the dominion. He doeth whatsoever He willeth [3.5s]... And then the voice of the Divine Lote-Tree sounded, calling aloud and saying: Praise be unto God Who hath ordained marriage to be a portal
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الاقتدار و القدره و الاختیار یفعل ما یشاء
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @prayer for married couples, @unity in diversity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
